title: cynanchum puberulum
intro: Cynanchum puberulum, also known as the hairy milkvine or Chinese milkvine, is a perennial plant species in the family Asclepiadaceae, native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Cynanchum puberulum include reducing fever, alleviating cough and respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
